name: Pumpkin Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together pumpkin, eggs, sugar, salt, ginger, cloves, and cinnamon in a large bowl.
2. Add the evaporated milk to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 13" x 9" x 2-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle the dry cake mix over the top of the batter.
5. Drizzle melted butter over the dry cake mix.
6. Sprinkle brown sugar evenly over the butter.
7. Add slivered almonds or chopped walnuts on top.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
9. Makes 9 servings, each measuring 3" x 4 1/4 inches.
